content:
cuz you know eventually i'll die and that'll be the end of that. And a (hopefully long) while after that someone will remember me for the last time and that'll really be the end of that. and the lenght of that will probably be decided by how meaningful the connections i made and the things i did were. so really in the end all i'm trying to do with this is extend that in-between period for as long as possible. i'm unfortunately (and by choice) not the kind of person to be remembered eternally by their contributions to the human experience, so all i'm left with is this desperate attempt of sorts.

however, paradoxically, i am not interesting in making something for mass appeal. what brings me inner peace is that thing being made and put up there, like throwing a bottle at the ocean. maybe someone will care, probably no one will, but it being there is now an unchangable fact.

If a tree falls in a forest and no one is around to hear it, does it make a sound? yes, I am the tree. my back hurts. now I gotta get back to work
